title: Website Track
decision_rationale: GL-210 excludes the incomplete untracked website-design placeholder material and creates a small static website baseline with explicit Developer Preview / Controlled Preview claim boundaries. The baseline avoids production, enterprise, compliance, official SDK/package, live PostgreSQL production, and real/private data readiness claims. It adds no publishing, tracking, forms, external dependencies, backend changes, API behavior changes, migrations, package metadata, workflows, or deployment automation.

existing_website_design_inspection.reason: The untracked website-design tree is incomplete and contains only README.md and IMPORT_CHECKLIST.md, while expected design/page/style/script files are absent. Existing import reports say no design files were found or imported. The README contains stale broad positioning such as MVP, pilot-readiness hardening, and production readiness in progress, so no material is adopted for GL-210.
existing_website_design_inspection.missing_path_note: The prompt-referenced path is absent; the present docs/website_design_workspace_import_report_dirty_stop.md stop report was inspected.

website_claim_boundary.posture: Developer Preview / Controlled Preview with strict boundaries
website_claim_boundary.data_boundary: Controlled Preview expansion is synthetic/demo data only
website_claim_boundary.security_reporting: Security-sensitive reports route to GitHub Security Advisories

allowed_website_claims: GrantLayer is an API-first Developer Preview
GrantLayer is a verification, audit, and compliance-support layer for agentic grant workflows
Controlled Preview is possible with strict boundaries
Controlled Preview expansion is synthetic/demo data only
Tenant/workspace isolation baseline is implemented, but not production-complete
Admin/operator tenant control-plane baseline exists, but not production-complete
Runtime/IAM/abuse/incident hardening baseline exists, but not production-complete
Data governance/audit operations baseline exists, but not production-complete
Internal SDK prototype exists, but no official SDK/package is available
Live PostgreSQL validation remains pending unless an ephemeral validation has actually been executed
Security-sensitive reports route to GitHub Security Advisories
no_public_publish_confirmation: No public publish, public GitHub push, deployment automation, or visibility change occurred.
no_analytics_tracking_forms_confirmation: The static website baseline contains no JavaScript, analytics, tracking, cookies, forms, external scripts, external assets, external fonts, or external API calls.

security_reporting_model.public_reports: Do not include exploit details, secrets, real customer data, private grant data, or institutional data in public reports

controlled_preview_boundary.status: Developer Preview / Controlled Preview with strict boundaries

production_readiness_impact.summary: GL-210 documents website claim boundaries and adds a static preview baseline only. It does not make GrantLayer production SaaS, enterprise ready, compliance certified, official SDK/package ready, live PostgreSQL production ready, or ready for real/private data.

remaining_blockers: Live PostgreSQL validation execution with ephemeral PostgreSQL
Production IAM and incident program completion
Official SDK/package decision and publication gates
Legal/compliance review before any compliance readiness claim

risk_register.mitigation: GL-210 tests scan website copy and decision artifacts for prohibited claims.

risk_register.risk: Incomplete website-design material is committed accidentally
risk_register.mitigation: GL-210 explicitly excludes website-design and documents the reason.

risk_register.risk: Tracking, forms, or external calls are introduced later
risk_register.mitigation: GL-210 tests reject forms, scripts, analytics/tracking keywords, external assets, and external API references.

risk_register.risk: Security reports disclose sensitive details publicly
risk_register.mitigation: Website and docs route security-sensitive reports to GitHub Security Advisories and prohibit exploit details/secrets/private data.
GL-210 keeps public publish prohibited and recommends a future publish gate.

findings: Allowed and prohibited website claims are documented.
Static website baseline is implemented without JavaScript, build system, external dependencies, analytics, tracking, cookies, or forms.
Existing website-design material was inspected and excluded.
Public publish remains prohibited and did not occur.
recommended_next_issues: GL-206B Live PostgreSQL Validation Execution when ephemeral PostgreSQL is available
